flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montana State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.3k → $33.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montana State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montana State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Montana State University are 20% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($53.3k vs $44.5k).
